note: Starter registry for governed data-foundation planning only. No assumption authorizes training or claims.

assumptions.statement: The current milestone may create registry templates and audits without adopting data for training.
assumptions.why_we_believe_it: Permitted by AGENTS.md and Phase 2 build checklist as governance/data-foundation scaffolding.
assumptions.what_would_make_it_false: A governance update that forbids scaffolding before human source-of-truth review.
assumptions.failure_consequence: Foundation artifacts would need human review before use.

assumptions.statement: Crawl source indexes can be used as source leads but not as verified scientific truth.
assumptions.why_we_believe_it: AGENTS.md and wiki source trust levels define crawls as raw evidence/source context requiring verification.
assumptions.what_would_make_it_false: A reviewed source registry promotes a specific crawl source to primary evidence after verification.
assumptions.failure_consequence: Unverified crawl summaries could contaminate dataset or claim decisions.

assumptions.statement: V1 artifacts are historical reference only until individually audited.
assumptions.why_we_believe_it: Governance and AGENTS.md prohibit treating V1 as canonical.
assumptions.what_would_make_it_false: A reviewed audit registers a specific V1 component with hashes, assumptions, and leakage status.
assumptions.failure_consequence: Stale artifacts could invalidate Phase 2 provenance and leakage controls.
